name: Whole Wheat Spice Bread- Regular Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine according to the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Add the water, white bread flour, wheat bread flour, dry milk, brown sugar, salt, butter, raisins, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger into the designated compartments of the bread machine as per the manufacturer's guidelines.
3. Close the lid securely and select the appropriate baking cycle.
4. Start the bread machine and allow it to complete the entire process.
5. The recipe will yield a 1-pound loaf once finished.
